verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to verify no compilation errors. Visual verification of side panel behavior.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is build-only.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns - Tailwind CSS for styling, lucide-react for icons, side panels use w-80 width with border-l border-slate-200.
key_patterns: Side panels (PinPanel, ReminderPanel, FullTaskManager) are rendered inside the 'flex-1 flex overflow-hidden' container after the main canvas. They use w-80 fixed width, bg-white, border-l border-slate-200, flex flex-col, overflow-hidden, shrink-0. Panel visibility is controlled by boolean state (e.g. showPinPanel). Nodes have {id, title, content, theme, x, y, groupId, cloneSourceId}. Node updates use updateNode(id, {title, content}). Selection state: selectedNodeIds (array) for multi-select, focusedNodeId for single focus. The updateNode function handles clone propagation. MarkdownRenderer component is already available for preview. Toggle buttons in sidebar use consistent pattern with colored active states.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx - main component, contains all state, updateNode, selectedNodeIds, panel rendering
src/PinPanel.jsx - reference for side panel structure and styling
src/MarkdownRenderer.jsx - reusable markdown preview component to use in the new panel
src/ReminderPanel.jsx - another reference for side panel patterns
directory_structure: src/ contains all source files. App.jsx is the monolithic main component (~5900 lines). Side panels are separate files (PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, FullTaskManager.jsx). Styles in index.css with Tailwind.
